front.title: Report from the IAB Workshop on IP Address Geolocation

abstract.t: The IAB Workshop on IP Address Geolocation (IP-GEO) was held from December 3-5, 2025, as a three-day virtual meeting. It covered the use cases and background on using IP addresses as indicators of geolocation, explored various problems and challenges that exist in that ecosystem, and discussed future directions and opportunities to improve or replace the current practices.
